CREATE TABLE time_test (event_id UInt8, time Time) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT * FROM time_test WHERE time = '00:00:00';
SELECT * FROM time_test WHERE time = '23:59:59';
SELECT * FROM time_test WHERE time = '-01:00:00';
SELECT * FROM time_test WHERE time = '999:59:59';
SELECT * FROM time_test WHERE time = '-999:59:59';
SELECT * FROM time_test WHERE time = '999:59:59' OR time = '-999:59:59';
SELECT event_id, time FROM time_test WHERE time < '00:01:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_test WHERE time > '-01:01:01';
CREATE TABLE additional_time_test (event_id UInt8, time Time) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
INSERT INTO additional_time_test SELECT event_id, time FROM time_test WHERE time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.event_id, a.time FROM time_test a JOIN additional_time_test b ON a.event_id = b.event_id WHERE a.time = b.time;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_test) AS total_records SELECT total_records, AVG(toUnixTimestamp(time)) FROM time_test;
SELECT DISTINCT time FROM time_test WHERE time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '23:59:59';
CREATE TABLE time_overflow_test (event_id UInt8, time Time) ENGINE = TinyLog;
INSERT INTO time_overflow_test VALUES (1, '1000:00:00'), (2, '-1000:00:00');
SELECT * FROM time_overflow_test WHERE time = '999:59:59';
SELECT CAST('12:15:45' AS Time) AS normalized_time;
SELECT CONCAT('Inserted Time: ', toString(time)) AS display_time FROM time_test;
